---
title: 2019 Data Science Bowl - Part 3 - Exploring the Game data
author: ~
date: '2019-10-31'
slug: 2019-data-science-bowl-part-3
categories: ['Analysis']
tags: ['R', 'kaggle', 'data science bowl']
description: 'Part 3 of a series on my contribution to the 2019 Data Science Bowl'
disableComments: no
bestof: yes
---

<script> 
  window.location.replace("https://tylerburleigh.com/data-science-bowl-2019/part-3-exploring-game-data.html");
</script>

## Go here: [https://tylerburleigh.com/data-science-bowl-2019/part-3-exploring-game-data.html](https://tylerburleigh.com/data-science-bowl-2019/part-3-exploring-game-data.html)
